rationale: Both evaluations give an identical score of 4/10 and converge on the same core finding: the candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, performance analysis for AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design. The wording of strengths and concerns differs slightly (e.g., naming Docker and workshops explicitly), but this is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing of the same underlying assessment. Nothing in the variant references location, nationality, or any demographic signal, and no penalty tracks the Berlin-to-Bucharest change.
